violations.text: A cup was observed in the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025

The counter where the dry ingredients and blenders are stored located in the front prep area was observed with peel and stick paper on top of approved materials for surfaces. The peel and stick paper were observed to be peeling and with an accumulation of food debris. Non-food contact surfaces must be cleaned/replaced as often as necessary. New Violation. Correct By: 05/07/2025
The front handwashing sink was observed being used as a dump sink. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine has an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 02/07/2024
